title: Rajasthan RPSC School Lecturer Special Online Form 2026
short_information: Rajasthan Public Service Commission has released the School Lecturer (Special) PGT Teacher 2026 Recruitment 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Recruitment Can Apply Online From 01/06/2026 to 30/06/2026 .candidates should read the RPSC School Lecturer Special 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the RPSC exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply. WhatsApp Join Now Telegram Join Now Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) RPSC School Lecturer Special Education Recruitment 2026 RPSC Advt No. : 01/Exam Lect.-Special Edu./ RPSC/EP-1/2026-27 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / Other State : 600/- OBC / BC : 400/- SC / ST : 400/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Mode. RPSC School Lecturer Special Education

rows: Rajasthan RPSC School Lecturer PGT Special Teacher Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 121 Post

Rajasthan Public Service Commission has released the School Lecturer (Special) PGT Teacher 2026 Recruitment 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Recruitment Can Apply Online From 01/06/2026 to 30/06/2026 .candidates should read the RPSC School Lecturer Special 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the RPSC exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.

tables.table_name: RPSC School Lecturer Special Education Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 21 Years. Maximum Age : 40 Years. Age Relaxation Extra as per RPSC School Lecturer Special Education Recruitment 2025.
rows: Rajasthan School Lecturer Special Education Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 121 Post Post Name Total Post RPSC School Lecturer Special Eligibility SCHOOL LECTURER (SPECIAL EDUCATION) – 2026 121 Master Degree with Hindi/English/History/Political Science/Sociology/Music Passed from Any Recognized University in India. B.ED. (Special Education) or B.ED. with two years Diploma in Special Education Recognized by the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI). Working knowledge of Hindi written in Devnagari Script and knowledge of Rajasthani culture. More Details & Subject Wise Eligibility Read the Full Notification
